## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ProjectMark's content strategy, SEO performance, and explore new content ideas for their construction CRM niche.](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to organize published blogs into topic clusters to identify content gaps and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Focus on construction-specific content while strategically incorporating broader CRM topics for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Explore creating an educational course series for business developers in construction](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Leverage LinkedIn for thought leadership and brand awareness using repurposed blog content](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

## Topics

### Content Organization and Strategy

  - [Request to group blogs into relevant topic clusters (e.g., CRM best practices, business development)](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Aim to identify content gaps and opportunities within the 7-8 main topic areas](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Balance between construction-specific content and broader CRM topics to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Preference to focus on buyer-centric content despite low search volume in the niche construction CRM market](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### SEO and Keyword Analysis

  - [Challenge: Competing with general CRM companies while specializing in construction](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Low search volume for construction-specific CRM keywords limits impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Strategy: Focus on construction terms while selectively targeting broader CRM topics relevant to ProjectMark's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Proposal: 60% construction-focused articles, 40% generic CRM articles to expand reach](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Performance and Optimization

  - [Two blogs showing promise: "Construction Marketing" and "Benefits of Construction CRM for Architecture and Engineering"](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Early-stage metrics: 2 clicks on these specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [Plan to optimize and expand on successful topics like construction marketing](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to target "construction marketing" keywords, potentially less competitive than "construction CRM"](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### LinkedIn Content Strategy

  - [Proposal to repurpose blog content for LinkedIn articles and thought leadership posts](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Suggestion to create 30-60 second video summaries of blog content for LinkedIn engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Recommendation to use automation for LinkedIn connection requests (100/week) to build network in the industry](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

### Lead Generation and Tracking

  - [Introduction to Clay tool for identifying blog visitors and qualifying leads](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Capability to automate lead scoring and outreach based on ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) fit](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Potential to set up automated email sequences for qualified leads visiting the blog](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sami to organize published blogs into topic clusters for review](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Thomas to review and provide feedback on topic ideas for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Explore "construction marketing" keywords and competition for potential content focus](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Implement LinkedIn content strategy, including repurposing blog content for articles and video summaries](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Consider setting up Clay tool for lead tracking and qualification from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Continue optimizing existing content, particularly the high-performing construction marketing and CRM benefits articles](https://fathom.video/share/RDk-9rLx3v8CViTisYzuQM5q3rfXchmQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
